subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter has been received. Praise be unto God, it indicates that through the presence of Jenabe Fazel
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
